# Casa Roca Canggu

## About
Casa Roca is a 10-room boutique guest house located at Jl. Batu Bolong, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali, Indonesia. The property is next to Aston Canggu Hotel and 5 minutes walk from Batu Bolong Beach.

## Room Categories
- Superior Room: private room with queen or twin beds, private balcony, en-suite bathroom, AC, TV
- Deluxe Room: larger private room with king, twin, or double+twin beds, private balcony, en-suite bathroom, AC, TV

## All Rooms Include
Private balcony, en-suite bathroom with rain shower and hot water, air conditioning, flat screen TV, free high-speed WiFi, free basement parking, daily housekeeping

## What is NOT included
No shared pool, no shared kitchen, no shared lounge — fully private room accommodation

## Booking
Direct booking: https://casaroca.com/availability
Email: casaroca@villavillabali.com

## Check-in / Check-out
Check-in: 14:00 WITA | Check-out: 12:00 WITA

## Location
Jl. Batu Bolong, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Badung, Bali 80361 Indonesia
Nearest beach: Batu Bolong Beach (400m, 5 min walk)
Airport: Ngurah Rai International (DPS) — 22km, 45–60 min by car

## Managed by
Villa Villa Bali — Bali property management company
